name: statement.dot
description: A humans-only social network. Statements you can verify, from humans you can trust.

_notes.ChainSubmit: Required — the app submits extrinsics (tips, contract calls) on Asset Hub.
_notes.ExternalRequest: Currently used to load web fonts from Google Fonts. Self-host the fonts to drop this permission before a hardened mainnet publish.
_notes.taxonomy: The Desktop permission taxonomy is still being finalized in the docs; adjust these to match the active Host build at publish time.
